title: Fave Couple
wikitext:
[]: Fave Couple Post by dylanjacobs1991 » Tue Jul 11, 2006 4:21 am whoo, boy am i gonna get flamed for this, i'm sure that this topic has come up a GAZILLION-and one times, but i just really like to know this stuff, who is everyones fave couple, straight (Asuka/Shinji, Misato/Kaji) Gay (Kaworu/Shinji, Maya/Ritsuko) Whatever, i would just like to know... May favorite would have to be Touji and Hikari, don't ask me why i just find it sweet how they can have such a cute and touching little romance going on in a "Die of Depression" kinda series, i also like Asuka/Shinji

[]: Post by Ryousanki King » Tue Jul 11, 2006 5:06 am I have a couple (some of which are contradictory): Asuka/Kaworu Asuka/Hikari Hikari/Maya Maya/Ritsuko (before Ritsuko turned blonde...seriously, she looked better before that) That's about it.

[]: Post by SEELE 08 » Tue Jul 11, 2006 5:11 am I dunno....most of this cast should be involunatrily sterilized before being paired off incase they might think of passing their highly defective genes along....but here's the pairings I approve of.... Asuka/Hikari Samshel/Sachiel SEELE 04/ SEELE 06 Asuka/Shinji (this place will turn you into an A/S fan if you aren't careful) Shinji/Shinji's own hand Unit 09/Unit 10 and for laffs.... Ritsuko/Tokita

[]: Post by jcmoorehead » Tue Jul 11, 2006 5:32 am Damnit someone already said Shinji and his hand. My favourite pairing. Asuka/Shinji Joke pairing (Minus the funny most likely) Rei/Rei/Rei Crossover Pairing. Gendo/Dr Frank N Furter.

[]: Post by the_seventh_child » Tue Jul 11, 2006 5:55 am My fav: Asuka and Shinji--like you didn't see this one coming! Oh yeah! Rei and Kaworu wouldn't be bad either!

[]: Post by Space Penis » Tue Jul 11, 2006 6:39 am Ryousanki King wrote: Hikari/Maya

[]: Post by Legend of the Past » Tue Jul 11, 2006 7:40 am One should take into acount that there isn't a single pairing in Evangelion that isn't wrong in some way. That said, I'll say who are in my eyes the CUTEST couple: Shinji\Asuka-Nothing to do with this place, I've liked that pairing from the start. I can imagine them married- Asuka crying out: 'WOMAN, WHERE'S MY DINNA?!' and Shinji giving her a nice, pretty steak. Maya\Ritsuko- I'm not charmed with the homosexual couplings, but their little moment of bonding in EoE was just cute. Shinji\His hand- Another couple who's had a moment of bonding in EoE. JOKE PAIRINGS: Keel\Gendo-We all know they're doing it since Second Impact. Rei\Touji-Just for the sake of all things ridiculous.

[]: Post by ChronoX » Tue Jul 11, 2006 8:52 am My favorite paring.... Rei AND MYSELF!!! seriously, umm probably Asuka/Shinji

[]: Post by Hau Ruck » Tue Jul 11, 2006 9:21 am Too cute.

[]: Post by Space Penis » Tue Jul 11, 2006 9:41 am This is a pretty cute pairing.

[]: Post by darth_mark » Tue Jul 11, 2006 10:35 am SEELE 08 wrote: Shinji/Shinji's own hand

[]: Post by Trowa_Ayanami » Tue Jul 11, 2006 11:11 am My favourite couple... take a guess.

[]: Post by Dr. Strangelove » Tue Jul 11, 2006 11:49 am Get ready for the...longest list you'll probabally see.. Lets just seperate them into categories: Shinji- Shinji/Asuka Shinji/Rei Shinji/Maya Shinji/Misato Shinji/Ritsuko I think that does it for Shinji... Auska- Asuka/Shinji Asuka/Rei Asuka/Maya Asuka/Misato Rei- Rei/Shinji Rei/Asuka Rei/Maya Rei/Misato Misato- See above and below for all Misato pairings Misato/Maya Ritsuko See above for all Ritsuko pairings but include Ritsuko/Misato Ritsuko/Maya Maya- See above for all Maya pairings
